# QA Process Change Survey — Item Draft

**Target population:** Programme coordinators at accredited institutions
**Shared anchor event:** March 2022 QA Policy Reform announcement
(all sampled programmes notified simultaneously — see event_calendar.md)

## Section A: Retrospective Practice Items

1. Since the introduction of the March 2022 QA Policy Reform, how often
   has your programme revised its self-evaluation report format?
   (1 = never, 5 = very often)

2. In the period following the March 2022 QA Policy Reform announcement,
   did your programme change the way it collects student feedback?
   (1 = no change, 5 = major change)

3. In the period following the March 2022 QA Policy Reform announcement,
   how many times did your programme consult external reviewers before the
   scheduled accreditation visit?
   (open numeric)

## Section B: Perceived Impact Items

4. The March 2022 QA Policy Reform improved the clarity of my programme's
   accreditation criteria.
   (1 = strongly disagree, 5 = strongly agree)

*Anchoring note: All retrospective items use the shared March 2022 event
date per psychometric_terminology_glossary.md event-anchoring requirement.*
